ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-05-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Continued To Oct-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carol Cotino, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Executor; Codi Dada, via ZOOM.

The court begins by querying Ms. Cotino regarding why she failed to appear at the previous calling of this matter. Ms. Cotino reports that she did not appear because she believed that she had complied with the court's request to file her papers. The court then advises that the court requires a corrected Inventory and Appraisal. Mr. Dada reports that there had been some questions regarding investments that required appraisal by the assigned probate referee and has a complete Final Inventory and Appraisal and plans to file it soon. Mr. Dada then queries the court regarding the requirement of additional bond. Mr. Dada is advised that currently, the court is not requiring an increase in bond.

The Status on Filing of Inventory and Appraisal (corrected) is continued to Oct-05-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Continued To Sep-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Codi Dada appeared by zoom for Carol Cotino (Administrator).

The Court questions why Ms. Cotino is not present. Mr. Dada stated that he does not know why Ms. Cotino is not here, that he is concerned about her, that he hasn't heard from her and that she is elderly. Mr. Dada also stated that an inventory and appraisal was mailed in to the Court on August 3rd and that they obtained full values for all of the assets. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Carol Cotino to appear on September 14, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain she failed to appear and to report on status of the inventory and appraisal. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-06-2021 Continued To Aug-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carol Cotino, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner; Codi Dada, via ZOOM, specially appearing.

The court begins by questioning Mr. Dada as to his position in this matter. Mr. Dada reports that he does not formally represent Ms. Cotino but is assisting her with this probate proceeding. The court advises both Mr. Dada and Ms. Cotino that the court will not allow Mr. Dada to testify as he does not legally represent Ms. Cotino. The court then queries to Ms. Cotino regarding the status of an Inventory and Appraisal. Ms. Cotino reports that there has been a delay in obtaining the value of one investment in annuity funds and will forward the value of the annuity to the referee as soon as possible. The court then advises Ms. Cotino that she should file a partial Inventory and Appraisal in the interim if a Final Inventory and Appraisal cannot be filed by the next calling of this matter.

After additional discussion, the Status of Filing of Inventory and Appraisal is continued to August 17, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Continued To Jul-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carol Cotino appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.
Codi Dada also appeared by zoom.

Mr. Dada stated that he has been filling out paper work and helping Ms. Cotino, that Ms. Cotino wants to be in Propria Persona, and assured the Court that they can get this done. Ms. Cotino stated that she is confident that she can administer this estate without an Attorney, that she is a CPA and that she has done this before in another State. The Court provided a list of responsibilities that Ms. Cotino will be expected to perform. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 26, 2015 is admitted to probate. Carol Cotino is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for June 8, 2021 at 9:00 a,m,, in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for February 8, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
